title: Glued
description: Make Glue, stain the ground with it and make mobs get glued
body:
![Screenshot of a comment on a GitHub issue showing an image, added in the Markdown, glued](https://i.imgur.com/NWigy0t.png)

**Make Glue, stain the ground with it and make mobs get glued.**

Glued is a small mod that introduces a new tool, glue. It allows players to stain the ground with glue to stick mobs to it. Make Villagers stand exactly where you want them without surrounding them with blocks.

![Screenshot of a comment on a GitHub issue showing an image, added in the Markdown, gluedvillager](https://i.imgur.com/y7BFfah.png)

# There are three kind of glues:

- **Glue**: This glue will stick any **non-aggressive** mobs in the ground until you remove the glue or by moving the mob. If the mob becomes aggressive, they will get out too.
- **Invisible-Glue**: It works in the same way as the regular Glue but its stain is almost invisible.
- **Magic-Glue**: This one works only for a limited time, but it can glue aggresive mobs.

![Screenshot of a comment on a GitHub issue showing an image, added in the Markdown, gluedvillager](https://i.imgur.com/LMQVrqg.gif)

But remember, turtles are too powerful to be glued. You should respect or be afraid of them. All hail the turtles.

 
##  **Right of Use**

- You can add this mod to a modpack (credits are appreciated). Note that the mod has not be fully tested on servers.
- Do NOT re-upload this mod on other websites. Always use a link to this page
